title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLX. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
There was an old woman
            Lived under a hill;
        And if she's not gone,
            She lives there still.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCLX. Gaffers And Gammers." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
